title: T-019 — POST /api/production/work-orders/:id/complete + closed_production_strict gate eval
prompt:
# T-019 — POST /work-orders/:id/complete with gate evaluation

PRD: 08-PRODUCTION-PRD.md §7.1 FR-08-E1-004, §8.2.1, §10.3, §6 D3

## Goal
Implement POST /complete that runs closed_production_strict_v1 gate (T-013 rule) and either transitions IN_PROGRESS→COMPLETED on pass, allows pass_with_override (Prod Manager + reason), or returns 409 with shortfall list.

## Implementation contract
Route apps/web/app/api/production/work-orders/[id]/complete/route.ts. Zod body {transaction_id: uuid, operator_id: uuid, override_reason_code?: string}. withIdempotency. Inside transaction: load WO, evaluate closed_production_strict_v1 gate (T-013 rule loader returns evaluator) — components consumed within tolerance + outputs registered. On pass → UPDATE work_orders.status='COMPLETED', UPDATE wo_executions.completed_at=now, completed_by. On fail without override → return 409 {error:'closed_production_strict_failed', gate_failures:[{component_id, short_by_qty}], outputs_missing:[...]}. On fail WITH override_reason_code AND requester role='production_manager' → set override_closed_production=true, override_reason, override_by; transition still occurs. Return 200 {wo_id, status:'COMPLETED', completed_at}.

## Files (scope)
- apps/web/app/api/production/work-orders/[id]/complete/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/production/work-orders/[id]/complete/__tests__/route.test.ts [create]
- packages/api-services/production/complete-wo.ts [create]
- packages/api-services/production/evaluate-closed-production-strict.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given all components consumed within 2% tolerance and all outputs registered, when POST /complete called, then 200 status=COMPLETED, completed_at set
2. Given component shortfall (consumed < 0.98×planned), when POST /complete without override, then 409 with gate_failures listing component_id and short_by_qty
3. Given shortfall + override_reason_code + requester role='production_manager', when POST /complete, then 200 with override_closed_production=true and override_by stamped

## Test strategy
- RED: route test asserting happy + 409 shortfall + override-pass before route exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test work-orders.*complete'

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow override by non-Production-Manager roles (R9)
- Do not skip outbox enqueue plumbing point (T-041 wires real emit)
- Do not bypass gate without override path

pipeline_inputs.description: POST /complete: runs closed_production_strict_v1 gate, supports override path for Production Manager.
pipeline_inputs.details: Gate evaluator reads BOM snapshot, sums wo_material_consumption per component, sums wo_outputs per type. Tolerance 0.02 from rule (T-013). Override path: reason_code + role check + audit stamp. 409 response shape includes shortfalls array. Outbox enqueue side-effect deferred to T-041 wiring.
out_of_scope: Do not implement output_yield_gate evaluation here (post-output side-effect; T-035)
acceptance_criteria: Given full consumption + outputs, when POST /complete, then 200 status=COMPLETED with completed_at
Given component shortfall without override, when POST /complete, then 409 + gate_failures list
Given shortfall + override_reason_code + role=production_manager, when POST /complete, then 200 + override_closed_production=true + override_by stamped
test_strategy: RED: route test asserting happy + 409 + override-pass before route exists
risk_red_lines: Do not allow override by non-PM roles
Do not skip outbox plumbing point
Do not bypass gate without override path
